When will Master's slaves be auctioned?
We have an auction tonight at midnight. If you are present, we can sell the slaves you brought.
How can I keep Master's slaves securely?
There are ways to keep the slaves with you on the road, or build a more permanent camp to keep them. Either way you will need someone to guard them.
